segments.text: Congratulations, job done, through to the last 16.
How pleased can you be with that result and performance?
Yeah, big performance from the guys.
We knew it weren't going to be easy.
We knew it was coming into a hostile environment.
Hot weather, it was tough, but I thought first half was really good.
We should have been two or three new up for sure.
Second half, it got tough.
They put us under a bit of pressure.
They got the momentum.
Once they scored, we kind of shifted it back in our direction.
And it's great to get the goal and obviously qualify now.
Yeah, I was going to say that demolition of Auckland City,
10 goals scored, unusual not to see your name on the score sheet.
But how much more motivated did that make you going into today?
A 39th goal of the season?
Yeah, 100 per cent.
As a striker, when your team scores 10 and you don't score,
of course you're looking at a missed opportunity.
But it is what it is, you know, we expected to win that game.
This game was more of a tougher opponent.
So I'm just happy to help the team with with a goal tonight.
And assist as well for Michael Alise for the winner.
Talk me through that one.
Clever little move that.
Yeah, it was a bit of a ricochet in the box and then the ball fell to me.
And obviously, Michael was there.
I tried to put him on his left foot and he kind of opened up the space.
And, you know, he's a great finisher and he finished off well.
You are through with a game to spare.
How motivated are all of you to go far in this tournament and hopefully win it?
What would it mean to you personally?
Yeah, it's a massive tournament.
You know, we're playing against the best teams in the world.
And, you know, for us, we've always said it's us against us.
You know, this that's the mindset we have that we just have to,
you know, compete to our highest level and we should be able to to beat most teams.
Of course, football is a game where sometimes things can go against you.
But, you know, so far, so good in this competition.
You are the player of the match as well.
So congratulations. Well done. Thank you.
